title: Isolation of Non-Parenchymal Liver Cells from Human Liver Biopsies
author: Charlotte Scott
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.viwe4fe

steps.title: Put liver biopsy in a new 50ml tube
steps.instruction: Put liver biopsy in a new 50ml tube

steps.title: Add 20 mL RPMI containing enzymes...
steps.instruction: Add 20 mL RPMI containing enzymes (1mg/ml Collagenase A & 10U/ml DNase)

steps.title: Put in shaking water bath at...
steps.instruction: Put in shaking water bath at 37 °C for 00:20:00 5 – shake vigorously every 00:05:00 by hand

steps.title: Add 20 mL cold PBS and place on ice
steps.instruction: Add 20 mL cold PBS and place on ice

steps.title: Lyse RBCs if required (add 4ml...
steps.instruction: Lyse RBCs if required (add 4ml RBC lysis buffer, incubate 4 °C for 00:03:00 , add 20 mL PBS and spin down as per step 7)

steps.title: Resuspend cells in FACS buffer (2%...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells in FACS buffer (2% FCS, 2mM EDTA, PBS) and count

steps.title: Filter through 40um filter and put...
steps.instruction: Filter through 40um filter and put on plate/in tube for staining

steps.title: Spin down as per step 7...
steps.instruction: Spin down as per step 7 and proceed with staining for flow cytometry as required

steps.title: Spin down as per step 7...
steps.instruction: Spin down as per step 7 and resuspend at desired concentration (2-5x10^6 in 200ul for flow cytometry staining)

steps.title: Make antibody mix
steps.instruction: Make antibody mix: 1. For Live CD45+ enrichment: Anti-Human CD45 APC-Cy7 Biolegend 368516 5ul/test (1 test = 5x10^6 cells in 100ul PBS) Fixable Live/Dead Viability Dye Stain Thermo Fischer 65-0866-18 1:300 in PBS. 2. For monocyte-macrophage enrichment: Anti-Human CD45 APC-Cy7 Biolegend 368516 5ul/test (1 test = 5x10^6 cells in 100ul PBS) Fixable Live/Dead Viability Dye Stain Thermo Fischer 65-0866-18 1:300 in PBS. Anti-Human CD14 AF488 Biolegend 301804 5ul/test Anti-Human CD16 PE-Dazzle 594 Biolegend 302054 5ul/test

steps.title: Stain sample 5x10^6 cells in 100ul...
steps.instruction: Stain sample 5x10^6 cells in 100ul PBS + Antibodies for 00:30:00 at 4 °C

steps.title: Add 5ml FACS buffer to wash...
steps.instruction: Add 5ml FACS buffer to wash (if staining in a tube) or 100ul FACS buffer to wash (if staining in a plate)

steps.title: Resuspend in 1-2ml FACS buffer and...
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 1-2ml FACS buffer and proceed to FACS to sort cells as Live CD45+, and CD14+CD16-, CD14+CD16+ and CD14-CD16+.
